cases.problem: the airflow scheduler keeps restarting because of a null database id field on the task instance
expected_root_causes: the scheduler crashes because the task instance's dag_version_id / task_id is null, failing UUID validation
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: a validation error on a UUID field that is unexpectedly None causes the scheduler to crashloop
a database migration left a null value in a column that the scheduler model requires to be a valid UUID

cases.problem: the background trigger service fails to launch after deployment
expected_root_causes: the triggerer process does not start after upgrading or deploying a new Airflow version
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: a startup or initialization bug in the triggerer component prevents it from running after deployment
a regression introduced in a recent release breaks the triggerer's startup sequence

cases.problem: the type checker crashes with a memory error while watching files for changes
expected_root_causes: the TypeScript compiler segfaults / runs out of memory when run in --watch mode on large projects
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: watch mode causes excessive memory usage in the compiler leading to a crash
a memory leak in the incremental/watch build causes the process to run out of memory

cases.problem: node process runs out of memory when building a large bundle of files
expected_root_causes: the TypeScript compiler exhausts the JavaScript heap when compiling tens of megabytes of source code
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: compiling a large amount of source code causes the compiler to run out of heap memory
the compiler's memory usage scales poorly with project size, causing OOM on large codebases

cases.problem: the generated API docs show the same operation identifier twice for an endpoint that supports several HTTP verbs
expected_root_causes: FastAPI generates a duplicate OpenAPI operationId when a single route is registered for multiple HTTP methods
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: the OpenAPI schema generator does not differentiate operationIds by HTTP method for multi-method routes
a route decorated for multiple methods produces colliding operation IDs in the generated docs

cases.problem: the keycloak token's audience claim is being ignored by the authentication layer
expected_root_causes: the JWTValidator does not use the configured audience setting when validating tokens issued by Keycloak
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: the auth manager's JWT validation logic ignores the configured jwt_audience setting
a missing audience check in the Keycloak auth manager causes tokens to be accepted/rejected incorrectly

cases.problem: type inference and switch statement narrowing bugs involving enums
expected_root_causes: the compiler fails to narrow types in a switch statement when the discriminant is an ambient/declared enum
acceptable_alternative_root_causes: type narrowing in switch statements does not work correctly for enums declared in ambient (.d.ts) modules
exhaustiveness checking fails for switch statements over ambient enum values

cases.problem: credit card payment processing failure in the checkout flow
